author: cms-sw
body: Submission Infrastructure (SI) requested to include [prmon](https://github.com/HSF/prmon) in our env. This is used for monitoring a running process.  It is build as a static executable to we can build it once for x86_64, aarch64 and riscv64 and then we can use it for any <os>_<arch>_<compiler>. Though it is deployed under normal `<CMS>/$SCRAM_ARCH/cms/prmon/<version>` but then at post install time it gets copied under `<CMS>/share/$(uname -m)/cms/prmon/<version>` so that it can be used by any $SCRAM_ARCH.
title: [prmon]Build and deploy prmon along with cmssw-tools
